description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a cutaway section revealing its internal layers. The outer surface is covered in a white quilted fabric with a subtle floral or botanical pattern, giving it a soft and inviting appearance. The interior is composed of at least three distinct layers: a thick blue foam base, a thinner purple foam or memory foam layer, and a white top comfort layer beneath the quilted cover. The sides of the mattress feature a wavy stitched pattern and a small circular vent or handle on one side. The overall construction suggests a modern, multi-layered foam mattress designed for comfort and support. The visible materials and design indicate a high-quality, contemporary household item suitable for urban living spaces.
description: A modern, multi-layered foam mattress with a white quilted cover and visible blue and purple foam layers in a cutaway section. The surface features a subtle floral pattern and a wavy stitched border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mattress with a cutaway corner, exposing the blue and purple foam layers beneath the white quilted cover.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the blue foam base and the layered construction, with the quilted cover and floral pattern visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the cutaway section, with the blue foam layer most prominent and the quilted surface extending across the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the wavy stitched border, a small circular vent or handle, and the exposed foam layers in the cutaway.
attribute_pattern_design: Quilted diamond pattern with subtle floral or botanical motifs evenly distributed across the surface.
attribute_edge_piping: Present; white fabric piping runs continuously around the edges, slightly raised and matching the main cover material.
